metadata.description: Independent predicate verification, per-class accuracy, atomic extraction P/R, McNemar significance testing, ECE calibration, decomposition-type stratification, and latency analysis. Fixes iteration-1 measurement flaws (invalid hallucination metric, 92.3% majority-class imbalance, no independent verification).

examples.input: [SYNTHETIC | S1] Document: Alice is the mother of Bob. Bob works as a teacher. | Query: Is Alice the mother of Bob?
[SYNTHETIC | S2] Document: Alice is the mother of Bob. Bob works as a teacher. | Query: Is Alice the mother of Charlie?
[SYNTHETIC | S3] Document: Mary is the mother of John. John is the father of Emma. John is a carpenter who lives in Springfield. | Query: Is Mary the grandmother of Emma?
[SYNTHETIC | S4] Document: Carol is the mother of David. David is the father of Eve. Eve is the mother of Frank. They all live in Boston. | Query: Is Carol an ancestor of Frank?
[SYNTHETIC | S5] Document: The ball is red. Red objects are considered premium and expensive in this market. The box is blue. | Query: Is the ball expensive?
[SYNTHETIC | S6] Document: The cat sat on the mat. The dog barked loudly. | Query: Does Alice own the cat?

[SYNTHETIC | S7] Document: In the matter of Smith v. Jones, the court found that defendant Jones breached the contract dated January 15, 2023. The plaintiff Smith suffered damages of $50,000 as a direct result of the breach. The court awarded compensatory damages to Smith. | Query: Is Jones liable for breach of contract?

[SYNTHETIC | S8] Document: The city council voted 7-2 to approve the new housing development. Mayor Thompson signed the ordinance into law on Monday. The development will create 500 new housing units and 200 jobs. Environmental groups opposed the project. | Query: Did the council approve the housing development?
[CLUTRR | C1] Document: Sarah and her brother Mike grew up together. Mike later married Lisa, and they had a daughter named Sophie. Sarah works as a nurse. | Query: Is Sarah the aunt of Sophie?
[CLUTRR | C2] Document: Tom is the father of Anna. Anna is the mother of Jake. Jake plays basketball every Saturday. Tom is retired. | Query: Is Tom the grandfather of Jake?
[CLUTRR | C3] Document: Helen is the mother of Peter. Peter married Kate, and Kate is the mother of Lucy. Helen loves to garden on weekends. | Query: Is Helen the grandmother of Lucy?

[CLUTRR | C4] Document: James and his sister Rebecca were raised by their parents in Texas. James married Carol, who gave birth to their son Timothy. Rebecca is a teacher. | Query: Is Rebecca the aunt of Timothy?
[CLUTRR | C5] Document: George is the father of Henry. Henry and William are brothers. William fathered a child named Oliver. George likes fishing. | Query: Is George the grandfather of Oliver?
[CLUTRR | C6] Document: Diana is the daughter of Margaret. Margaret's sister is Elizabeth. Elizabeth has a son named Charles. Diana is an architect. | Query: Is Elizabeth the aunt of Diana?
[CLUTRR | C7] Document: Robert and Susan are siblings. Robert became a father when his daughter Patricia was born. Patricia now has a daughter named Linda. | Query: Is Susan the aunt of Patricia?
[CLUTRR | C8] Document: Alice's father is called David. David's father is called Frank. Alice studies computer science. | Query: Is Frank the grandfather of Alice?
[RULETAKER | R1] Document: All mammals are warm-blooded. Dogs are mammals. Cats are mammals. Fish are not mammals. | Query: Is the dog warm-blooded?
[RULETAKER | R2] Document: All students who study hard pass their exams. Maria studies hard every night. John does not study hard. | Query: Does Maria pass her exam?
[RULETAKER | R3] Document: All things that are heavy sink in water. The rock is heavy. The feather is not heavy. | Query: Does the rock sink in water?
[RULETAKER | R4] Document: All birds can fly. Penguins are birds. Eagles are birds. Eagles have sharp talons. | Query: Can the eagle fly?
[RULETAKER | R5] Document: All carnivores eat meat. All animals that eat meat are predators. Lions are carnivores. Rabbits are herbivores. | Query: Is the lion a predator?
[RULETAKER | R6] Document: Athletes who train daily are in good shape. People in good shape are healthy. Alex trains every single day without exception. | Query: Is Alex healthy?

[RULETAKER | R7] Document: All renewable energy sources are sustainable. Sustainable resources protect the environment. Solar power is a renewable energy source. | Query: Does solar power protect the environment?
[RULETAKER | R8] Document: Anyone who commits fraud is dishonest. Dishonest people cannot be trusted. Victor committed fraud last year according to court records. | Query: Cannot Victor be trusted?
[RULETAKER | R9] Document: All planets orbit a star. Objects that orbit a star are part of a solar system. Mars is a planet. | Query: Is Mars part of a solar system?

[RULETAKER | R10] Document: All electric vehicles have zero direct emissions. The Tesla Model S is an electric vehicle. Gasoline cars have emissions. | Query: Does the Tesla Model S have zero direct emissions?
